title: High stakes battle in Bahadurganj as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Bahadurganj. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Bahadurganj
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Bahadurganj constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Bahadurganj
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Bahadurganj assembly segment.
